title: The Emperor and the Golem
writer: Jirí Brdecka, Martin Fric, Jan Werich
actors: Jan Werich, Marie Vásová, Natasa Gollová
plot: Emperors baker and Bakers emperor - it refers to the fact that in movie just a regular young baker gets switched with real old Emperor which leaves everyone thinking that emperor did get younger by drinking the potion of youth.
